content: Tiptap server-side serialization: @tiptap/html exports generateHTML(json, extensions[]) and generateJSON(html, extensions[]). generateHTML runs in Node.js without a DOM using ProseMirror's serializer; you MUST pass the same extensions array used in the editor (Document, Paragraph, Text, Bold, etc.) or those nodes/marks silently disappear from output. It only uses each extension's renderHTML — custom NodeView React components do NOT execute server-side, so their renderHTML must be defined. Store Tiptap JSON in DB, sanitize the produced HTML with isomorphic-dompurify before storage AND before render.
